name: ScienceDirect Paper Access Workflow
description: Fetch a ScienceDirect paper's metadata, abstract, and PDF link.

help.summary: Open a ScienceDirect article page and return title, journal, citation, DOI, abstract, PDF link, and author list.

parameters.name: paper_url
parameters.description: Absolute URL to a ScienceDirect article (.../science/article/pii/<PII>). Pre-resolve DOIs to a ScienceDirect URL before calling.

examples.description: Fetch full metadata for an open-access paper.

help.returns: Two result blocks. Block 1 (one item): title, journal, citation (e.g. 'Volume 1, Issue 9, 11 December 2020, 100141'), doi, abstract, pdf_url. Block 2 (array): one entry per author with a name field.
notes: pdf_url points to the /pdfft entitlement endpoint; for paywalled articles this redirects to an access-required page rather than a PDF.
citation bundles volume, issue, date, and page/article number — callers parse if individual fields are needed.
abstract is pulled from div.abstract.author and may include a leading section title (e.g. 'Summary').

browser_automation.description: Loads the article URL and scrapes metadata + PDF link from the article header.

sequences.name: paper_access_extraction
sequences.description: Extract metadata, abstract, and PDF link from a ScienceDirect article page.

required_variables.name: paper_url
required_variables.description: Absolute URL to a ScienceDirect article page.
